heading: Construction of provisions of subchapter
label: 1597 Construction of provisions of subchapter
text: Except as provided in sections 620d(d)(5), 1543(g)(2), and 1595(b) of this title, with respect to the Colorado River Basin Project Act [ et seq.] and the Colorado River Storage Project Act [ et seq.], respectively, nothing in this subchapter shall be construed to alter, amend, repeal, modify, interpret, or be in conflict with the provisions of the Colorado River Compact (), the Upper Colorado River Basin Compact (), the Water Treaty of 1944 with the United Mexican States (Treaty Series 994; ), the decree entered by the Supreme Court of the United States in Arizona against California and others (376 U.S. 340), the Boulder Canyon Project Act () [ et seq.], Boulder Canyon Project Adjustment Act (; ) [ et seq.], section 15 of the Colorado River Storage Project Act (; ), the Colorado River Basin Project Act (), section 6 of the Fryingpan-Arkansas Project Act () [], section 15 of the Navajo Indian irrigation project and initial stage of the San Juan-Chama Project Act () [], the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 [ et seq.], and the Federal Water Pollution Control Act, as amended [ et seq.].43 U.S.C. 150143 U.S.C. 62045 Stat. 105763 Stat. 3159 Stat. 121945 Stat. 105743 U.S.C. 61754 Stat. 77443 U.S.C. 618a43 U.S.C. 61870 Stat. 11143 U.S.C. 620n82 Stat. 88576 Stat. 39343 U.S.C. 616e76 Stat. 10243 U.S.C. 615ww42 U.S.C. 432133 U.S.C. 1251
notes: References in TextSections 620d(d)(5), 1543(g)(2), and 1595(b) of this title, referred to in text, was in the original a reference to “section 205(b) and 205(d) of this title”, meaning section 205(b) and (d) of title II of . Section 205(b)(1) is classified to ; section 205(b)(2) amended section 403(g) of the Colorado River Basin Project Act by inserting a new par. (2), which is classified to ; and section 205(d) amended section 5(d) of the Colorado River Storage Project Act by inserting a new par. (5), which is classified to .Pub.
